name: @cms/admin-base
//: Vendored prebuilt bundle of cms-ai-core/packages/admin-base, so this admin builds standalone on Vercel (the source repo isn't a sibling there). The dist/ layout mirrors the source package so cms-ai-core's start.sh hot-sync keeps working in local dev. Refresh with `pnpm vendor:admin-base` after any admin-base change. Only react/react-dom/@mantine/core/@mantine/hooks are externalized (everything else is bundled into dist/index.js), so those are the only peers.
